name: Falcon-180B
license: TII Falcon-180B License and Acceptable Use Policy (commercial use permitted, excludes hosting use)
archDisplay: Causal decoder-only Transformer, 180B (80 layers, multiquery attention, RoPE, FlashAttention)
note: Billed as the world's most powerful openly released LLM at launch; trained on 3.5T RefinedWeb tokens, scored 67.85 avg on Open LLM Leaderboard.

results.notes: 5-shot (harness|winogrande|5), archived Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation run
5-shot (harness|gsm8k|5), archived Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation run

3-shot DROP F1 (harness|drop|3, f1=0.065733), from the SAME archived Open LLM Leaderboard v1 run (results_2023-10-24T10-17-51.759984.json) already used in the corpus for this model's winogrande (86.9) and gsm8k (45.94) rows -- this run also scored DROP but that task was not yet in the corpus. Verified by directly fetching the run's results JSON.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via HF blog (huggingface.co/blog/falcon-180b, fetched): release date Sept 6 2023, 180B params, 3.5T training tokens, multiquery attention, license excludes hosting use, and the 67.85 Open LLM Leaderboard average (with 68.74 pre-Nov-2023 note) appear verbatim. Model card (tiiuae/falcon-180B, fetched) confirms 2048 context length, license name 'Falcon-180B TII License', and language list (English/German/Spanish/French plus 7 limited-capability languages = 11 total). No changes made; all fields and the single result row confirmed.
